notes.subject: BOGO LAUNCHES TODAY — protect speed + standards
notes.body: Brad confirmed BOGO starts today. Pre-shift the whole crew before 11:00. Expect a sales lift — speed-of-service cannot break consistency. Patty + 1 cheese unless modified; don't drift into 2-patty muscle memory. Tare the fry scoop at open, 5-second hold, no overfill.

notes.subject: Close BOTH Labor Reviews (5/11 + 5/12) before Crystal sees alert chain
notes.body: 5/11 task did not close yesterday; 5/12 added overnight at 03:18 ET. Log into NetChef this morning and close both. This is the highest-visibility CT task on the desk right now.

notes.subject: Customer Service at the Register + Blackberry Shake LTO — hit 0% overdue
notes.body: Brad asked all stores to hit 0% by Friday. 2 days out. Push the team to complete tonight — confirm on FGU report before leaving.

notes.subject: Large Soda is 30¢ more than Regular (not 10¢)
notes.body: Brad's standing directive — kill the old 'only 10 cents more' line at register. Suggestive sell language: 'Large is only 30 cents more.' Review with whole team at pre-shift.

notes.subject: COGS · Shops · Steritech · Labor
notes.body: COGS: portion fries, BOGO patty discipline, waste log initialed after 12-min hold. Shops: 5-sec greet, 30¢ Large language, order callback at handoff. Steritech: manager walk 10:30 AM + 4:30 PM, DayMark current, restroom hourly. Labor: 30-min breaks documented, hours within ±5%, close L-Rev tasks.

notes.subject: Best Burger America 2026!
notes.body: Let's grow - Best Burger 2026! This is HUGE - Congratulations! Keep up the Standards & Consistency and we'll keep the trend running! BOGO starts tomorrow - exciting times to be with this Brand! Pre-shift the crew on standards under volume — speed cannot break consistency.

notes.subject: Permit #120072 — Regular Inspection
notes.body: Regular health inspection completed 5/12. Report attached to fg2065 inbox. Pull the PDF, photograph any findings, file in the Steritech binder. Fix anything called out before noon today.

notes.subject: BG check sent — Active count 23 → 24
notes.body: Anthony Pirtle background check sent 5/12. Added to employee directory as Anthony — (PHONE PENDING). Pull phone from BG-check PDF when it lands. Madison runs his Orientation Checklist when he starts.
